titleStmt.title: Letter from P.F. Quinlan to Fr Provincial Thomas V. Nolan, 30 September 1918
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: P.F. Quinlan

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter from P.F. Quinlan to Fr. Nolan regarding the letter that P.F. Quinlan received from Fr. Fitzgibbon about a financial issue.
Fr. Thomas Nolan (1867- 1922) became the Provincial of the Irish Province of the Society of Jesus from 1912 to 1922. Besides that, he was a Distribution Committee member responsible for the welfare and distribution of the Belgian refugees who had found refuge in Ireland on account of the World War I.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
P.F. Quinlan, LL.B., Solicitor
68 Middle Abbey Street Dublin
30 Septr 1918 re Major Rev. J.J. Fitzgibbon. S.J., M.C., C.F.
Decd.p> Dear Fr. Nolan, I have this morning received
a letter from Sir C. McGregor & Co, informing
me that the amount standing to credit of
deceased is £65:17:5. They also state
that any pay due to the estate, also gratuity,
should be claimed from the Sec. War Office.
I have not yet received any reply to my
letter of 23rd inst. on this matter addressed
to the Secretary of the War office. /p> Faithfully Yours. P.F. Quinlan
p.p. Q.A.G Very Rev. T.B. Nolan, S.J.
Provincial
The Presbytery
Upr Gardiner St.
